name: qa_manager_get_error_context_by_id
desc: Resolve one or more QA Manager finding ids (e.g. ERR-001, ERR-003) back to their full JSON rows so the chat can reason over the finding's description, element ids, category, level, severity, status and location. Read-only; no Revit transaction. Pair with the @mention palette: when the user inserts `@ERR-001` the LLM calls this tool to pull the rest of the context without re-running the rule engine.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated finding ids (e.g. 'ERR-001,ERR-003'). Whitespace around commas is tolerated. Empty string returns every finding currently cached in the open QA Manager window (capped at 50 to protect the prompt budget).
